stages.concept:
# Unit 137: 관계부사와 선행사의 생략 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계부사와 선행사의 생략**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 관계부사는 **선행사** 또는 **관계부사** 중 하나를 생략할 수 있어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **when** — 선행사(the time) 또는 when 생략

> I remember the time **when** we first met. (완전)
> → I remember **when** we first met. (선행사 생략)
> → I remember the time we first met. (when 생략)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **where** — 선행사(the place) 또는 where 생략

> This is the place **where** I was born. (완전)
> → This is **where** I was born. (선행사 생략)
> → This is the place I was born. (where 생략)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **why** — 선행사(the reason) 또는 why 생략

> That's the reason **why** I came. (완전)
> → That's **why** I came. (선행사 생략)
> → That's the reason I came. (why 생략)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **how** — the way 또는 how만 쓸 수 있음 (둘 다 X)

> ✅ This is **how** I did it. (선행사 생략)
> ✅ This is **the way** I did it. (how 생략)
> ❌ This is **the way how** I did it.

**Q. 다음 빈칸에 생략된 단어를 고르세요.**
"Do you know the reason (       ) he didn't come to the party?"
1. that
2. which
3. why ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 선행사가 'the reason'이므로 뒤에는 관계부사 why가 어울리고, 이 why는 문맥상 의미가 충분히 통하므로 생략이 가능했던 거예요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 선행사나 관계부사 중 하나는 생략 가능! how만 the way와 함께 못 쓴다는 것 기억!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 137: 관계부사와 선행사의 생략 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는지 없는지 선택하시오.
Do you know the place where this book is sold?
> **정답** 둘 중 하나 생략 가능 (the place 또는 where)

---

**02.** I remember the time when we first met.
> **정답** 둘 중 하나 생략 가능 (the time 또는 when)

---

**03.** Tell me the reason why you were late.
> **정답** 둘 중 하나 생략 가능 (the reason 또는 why)

---

**04.** This is how he solved it.
> **정답** how에서 선행사 the way 이미 생략됨

---

**05.** I know the reason why she is angry.
> **정답** 둘 중 하나 생략 가능

---

**06.** 관계부사 또는 선행사를 생략하여 문장을 다시 쓰시오.
I remember the day when we first met.
(선행사 생략)
> **정답** I remember when we first met.

---

**07.** I remember the day when we first met.
(관계부사 생략)
> **정답** I remember the day we first met.

---

**08.** This is the place where I was born.
(선행사 생략)
> **정답** This is where I was born.

---

**09.** Tell me the reason why you are sad.
(선행사 생략)
> **정답** Tell me why you are sad.

---

**10.** She showed me the way how she solved it.
> **정답** 틀린 문장! the way와 how는 함께 쓸 수 없음.
→ She showed me how she solved it. 또는 She showed me the way she solved it.

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
이곳이 내가 태어난 곳이다. (선행사 생략)
This is I was born.
> **정답** where

---

**12.** 내가 늦은 이유를 말해 줄게. (관계부사 생략)
I'll tell you I was late.
> **정답** the reason

---

**13.** 나는 우리가 만난 날을 기억한다. (선행사 생략)
I remember we first met.
> **정답** when

---

**14.** 이것이 그가 그것을 만든 방법이다.
This is he made it.
> **정답** how

---

**15.** 그녀가 화난 이유를 아니? (관계부사 생략)
Do you know she is angry?
> **정답** the reason

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이곳이 내가 공부하는 곳이다. (선행사 생략)
This where is I study
> **정답** This / is / where / I / study

---

**17.** 내가 늦은 이유를 말해 줄게. (선행사 생략)
I'll you tell why I was late
> **정답** I'll / tell / you / why / I / was / late

---

**18.** 이것이 그가 성공한 방법이다.
This how is he succeeded
> **정답** This / is / how / he / succeeded

---

**19.** 나는 우리가 만난 날을 기억한다. (관계부사 생략)
remember I the day we met
> **정답** I / remember / the / day / we / met

---

**20.** 그녀가 슬픈 이유를 말해 줘. (선행사 생략)
Tell why me she is sad
> **정답** Tell / me / why / she / is / sad
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 137: 관계부사와 선행사의 생략 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I think the way people treat them is wrong.
March is the month when flowers begin to
bloom.
France is the place where I lived when I was
young.
I remembered lunch time when I met her.
> **정답** March is the month when flowers begin to bloom.,
France is the place where I lived when I was young.

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
There is the reason why I like her.
He saw how she communicated with
customers.
The place where I traveled is a remote island.
This is the sofa where I read books.
> **정답** There is the reason why I like her.

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
The apartment where I lived had a beautiful
view.
I know the reason why you went abroad to
study.
The way how he solves the problem is
amazing.
The time when he falls asleep is irregular.
> **정답** The apartment where I lived had a beautiful view.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He figured out how they broke into the house.
The store where the peanuts were sold closed
yesterday.
I wonder the reason why dogs like the snack.
The place where I stay is famous.
> **정답** He figured out how they broke into the house., The
store where the peanuts were sold closed yesterday.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The hotel where he worked went bankrupt.
I remember when she was happy.
The children wanted to know the way how the
man became a hero.
Let me know why the article was written.
> **정답** The children wanted to know the way how the man
became a hero.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The store where I buy gifts opens at 9 o'clock.
It was noon when they were eating.
The way he catches fish is cool.
I have the reason why we raise a cat.
> **정답** I have the reason why we raise a cat.

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을
고르시오.
I went to the place.
Many people are in the place.
I went to the place many people are.
I went to the place which many people are.
I went to the place in which many people are.
I went to where many people are.
> **정답** I went to the place which many people are.

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 옳은 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
I remember the day.
The Olympics were held on that day.
I remember the day the Olympics were held
on the day.
I remember the day the Olympics were held.
I remember which the Olympics were held.
I remember when the Olympics were held.
> **정답** I remember the day the Olympics were held., I
remember when the Olympics were held.

---

**09.** 주어진 두 문장을 관계부사 또는 선행사를 생략한
문장으로 바꿀 때 옳은 것을 고르시오.
Do you find the reason?
This food went bad for the reason.
Do you find which this food went bad?
Do you find the reason this food went bad?
Do you find why this food went bad for the
reason?
Do you find why this food went bad?
> **정답** Do you find the reason this food went bad?, Do you
find why this food went bad?

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적합하지 않는 것을 고르시오.
Amy knows
_____________________________________.
the reason which she entered this college
the reason she entered this college
why she entered this college
the reason why she entered this college
> **정답** the reason which she entered this college

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They want to know the way __________________.
how the refrigerator freezes the water.
the refrigerator freezes the water.
which the refrigerator freezes the water.
when the refrigerator freezes the water.
> **정답** the refrigerator freezes the water.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The building _________________ is famous.
an actress lives
when an actress lives
where an actress lives
which an actress lives
> **정답** where an actress lives

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
_________________ is 11 p.m.
The time which I like watching movies
The time I like watching movies
When I like watching movies
Which I like watching movies
> **정답** The time I like watching movies, When I like
watching movies

---

**14.** 다음 중 생략된 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
The day she submits the report is tomorrow.
I don't like the day he decided to meet me.
Tell me the reason you didn't attend the
meeting.
That's the moment you got hurt.
> **정답** Tell me the reason you didn't attend the meeting.

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
그 소녀는 무지개를 본 순간을 잊지 못한다.
The girl can't forget when she saw the
rainbow.
The girl can't forget the moment she saw the
rainbow.
The girl can't forget what she saw the
rainbow.
The girl can't forget where she saw the
rainbow.
> **정답** The girl can't forget the moment she saw the
rainbow., The girl can't forget when she saw the
rainbow.

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 코치가 팀을 훈련시키는 방법은 흥미롭다.
The way the coach trains the team is
interesting.
The way which the coach trains the team is
interesting.
The way why the coach trains the team is
interesting.
The way how the coach trains the team is
interesting.
> **정답** The way the coach trains the team is interesting.

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작하지 못한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그가 거짓말을 한 이유를 이해한다.
I understand the reason he told a lie.
I understand which he told a lie.
I understand the reason why he told a lie.
I understand why he told a lie.
> **정답** I understand which he told a lie.

---

**18.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작하지 못한 것을 고르시오.
그곳은 내가 스케이트보드를 타곤 했던 장소다.
That's the place I used to skateboard.
That's the place which I used to skateboard.
That's the place where I used to skateboard.
That's where I used to skateboard.
> **정답** That's the place which I used to skateboard.

---

**19.** 다음 두 문장에서 생략된 관계부사를 찾아 순서대로
연결한 것을 고르시오.
I cleaned up the place the children played.
He discovered the way the machine worked.
where - how
where - when
when - why
what - that
> **정답** where - how

---

**20.** 다음 두 문장에서 생략된 관계부사를 찾아 순서대로
연결한 것을 고르시오.
He asked her the reason she arrived late.
Valentine's Day is the day she proposed to me.
why - when
when - why
why - where
why - how
> **정답** why - when
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 137 관계부사와 선행사의 생략중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장에서 빈칸에 알맞은 관계부사 또는 선행사를
쓰시오.
May 1st is the day  (     )  we get married.
정답 when

---

**02.** 다음 문장에서 빈칸에 알맞은 관계부사 또는 선행사를
쓰시오.
That's  (     )   (     )  why they adopted a child.
정답 the, reason

---

**03.** 다음 문장에서 빈칸에 알맞은 관계부사 또는 선행사를
쓰시오.
The dog chose the place  (     )  they could stay.
정답 where

---

**04.** 주어진 두 문장을 선행사를 생략한 문장으로 바꾸어
쓰시오.
It's the place.
People can camp for a day in that place.
It's  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 where, people, can, camp, for, a, day

---

**05.** 주어진 두 문장을 관계부사를 생략한 문장으로 바꾸어
쓰시오.
I learned the way from my dad.
I ride a bicycle in the way.
I learned  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 from my dad.
정답 the, way, I, ride, a, bicycle

---

**06.** 주어진 두 문장을 관계부사를 생략한 문장으로 바꾸어
쓰시오.
I don't know the reason.
Tom isn't in class today for that reason.
I don’t know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 today.
정답 the, reason, Tom, isn’t, in, class

---

**07.** 주어진 두 문장을 선행사를 생략한 문장으로 바꾸어
쓰시오.
New Year's Day is the day.
we make plans for the year on the day.
New Year's Day is  (     )  we make plans for the year.
정답 when

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계부사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
The place he played soccer disappeared.
→ 
disappeared.
정답 The place where he played soccer

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계부사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
You should tell me the reason you were late for
school.
→ You should tell me
.
정답 the reason why you were late for school

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계부사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
It snowed a lot on the day I was born.
→ It snowed a lot on
.
정답 the day when I was born

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 137: 관계부사와 선행사의 생략 - 변형문제

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I think the way people communicate is important.
April is the month when cherry blossoms begin to bloom.
Italy is the place where I lived when I was young.
I remembered lunch time when I saw her.
> 정답: April is the month when cherry blossoms begin to bloom.,

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
There is the reason why I admire her.
He saw how she handled the situation.
The place where I traveled is a small village.
This is the bench where I read books.
> 정답: There is the reason why I admire her.

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
The café where I worked had a cozy atmosphere.
I know the reason why you went to the library early.
The way how he fixes the bike is impressive.
The time when he wakes up is different every day.
> 정답: The café where I worked had a cozy atmosphere.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She figured out how they escaped from the building.
The shop where the cookies were sold closed yesterday.
I wonder the reason why cats like that toy.
The park where I jog is well-known.
> 정답: She figured out how they escaped from the building., The

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The restaurant where he worked went out of business.
I remember when she was cheerful.
The students wanted to know the way how the scientist made the discovery.
Let me know why the report was written.
> 정답: The students wanted to know the way how the scientist

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The shop where I buy supplies opens at 10 o'clock.
It was evening when they were eating.
The way he catches butterflies is creative.
I have the reason why we adopt a pet.
> 정답: I have the reason why we adopt a pet.

---

**07.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을 고르시오.
I went to the café.
Many people are in the café.
I went to the café many people are.
I went to the café which many people are.
I went to the café in which many people are.
I went to where many people are.
> 정답: I went to the café which many people are.

---

**08.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I remember the day.
The festival was held on that day.
I remember the day the festival was held on the day.
I remember the day the festival was held.
I remember which the festival was held.
I remember when the festival was held.
> 정답: I remember the day the festival was held., I remember when the festival was held.

---

**09.** 주어진 두 문장을 관계부사 또는 선행사를 생략한 문장으로 바꿀 때 옳은 것을 고르시오.
Do you find the reason?
This milk went bad for the reason.
Do you find which this milk went bad?
Do you find the reason this milk went bad?
Do you find why this milk went bad for the reason?
Do you find why this milk went bad?
> 정답: Do you find the reason this milk went bad?, Do you

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 적합하지 않는 것을 고르시오.
Amy knows _____________________________________.
the reason which she chose this school the reason she chose this school why she chose this school the reason why she chose this school
> 정답: the reason which she chose this school

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They want to know the way __________________.
how the oven heats the food. the oven heats the food. which the oven heats the food. when the oven heats the food.
> 정답: the oven heats the food.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The house _________________ is famous.
a musician lives when a musician lives where a musician lives which a musician lives
> 정답: where a musician lives

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
_________________ is 10 p.m.
The time which I like listening to music The time I like listening to music When I like listening to music Which I like listening to music
> 정답: The time I like listening to music, When I like

---

**14.** 다음 중 생략된 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
The day she finishes the project is Friday.
I don't like the day he chose to visit me.
Tell me the reason you didn't join the practice.
That's the moment you got hurt.
> 정답: Tell me the reason you didn't join the practice.
